summary: Aligned qd playbook branch naming guidance with the current spec/<node-id> convention while preserving awareness of historical qd/ branches.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: docs/QD_WORKFLOW.md documents that qd worktree branches should carry the exact qd node id and default to spec/<node-id> unless the node already records a different branch.
docs/ORCHESTRATION.md tells orchestrators to inspect open PRs with current spec/ and historical qd/ branch prefixes.
docs/ORCHESTRATION.md implementor prompt uses spec/<node-id> rather than qd/<node-id>-short-topic.
No qd behavior changes and no historical evidence, report, or branch rewrites.
Evidence and qd reports are recorded under evidence/m4-qd-branch-naming-doc-sync and reports/qd/m4-qd-branch-naming-doc-sync.
git diff --check, just qd-reports-check, and nix develop -c just check pass.
No product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, latency, Mac hardware, workflow dispatch, or credential-dependent claim is made.

commandsRun.command: rg -n "spec/<node-id>|qd/<node-id>|open PRs whose branch|branch name that carries|Use a qd worktree and branch" docs/QD_WORKFLOW.md docs/ORCHESTRATION.md

realWorldValidation.evidence: This is a qd workflow documentation alignment node and does not require product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, latency, Mac hardware, workflow dispatch, or credential-dependent validation.
